phrases.intent_en: Ask where Piazza dei Cavalieri is
phrases.cultural_note: Piazza dei Cavalieri was the political centre of medieval Pisa, now home to the Scuola Normale Superiore, one of Italy's elite universities.

responses.english: Straight along Via dei Mille, then left.
responses.phonetic: DREET-toh per VEE-ah day MEEL-leh, poi ah see-NEES-trah.
responses.french: Dritto per Via dei Mille, poi a sinistra.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to eat traditional Pisan food
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si mangia la cucina pisana tipica?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see MAN-jah lah koo-CHEE-nah pee-ZAH-nah TEE-pee-kah?

responses.english: At Piazza delle Vettovaglie, several historic restaurants.
responses.phonetic: een PYAHT-tsah DEL-leh vet-toh-VAL-yeh, dee-VER-see rees-toh-RAN-tee STOH-ree-chee.
responses.french: In Piazza delle Vettovaglie, diversi ristoranti storici.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how far the Leaning Tower is from the historic centre
phrases.text_local: Scusi, quanto è lontana la Torre Pendente dal centro?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KWAN-toh eh lon-TAH-nah lah TOR-reh pen-DEN-teh dal CHEN-troh?

responses.english: About a kilometre, fifteen minutes on foot.
responses.phonetic: CHEER-kah oon kee-loh-MEH-troh, kween-DEE-chee mee-NOO-tee ah PYEH-dee.
responses.french: Circa un chilometro, quindici minuti a piedi.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to catch the bus to the airport
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si prende il bus per l'aeroporto?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see PREN-deh eel boos per lah-eh-roh-POR-toh?

responses.english: At Piazza Manin, near the station.
responses.phonetic: een PYAHT-tsah mah-NEEN, vee-CHEE-noh AL-lah stah-TSYOH-neh.
responses.french: In Piazza Manin, vicino alla stazione.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the university buildings are
phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove si trova l'università di Pisa?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh see TROH-vah loo-nee-ver-see-TAH dee PEE-zah?

responses.english: Spread through the centre, the main building is on Via Curtatone.
responses.phonetic: dees-tree-BWEE-tah nel CHEN-troh, eel pah-LAHT-tsoh preen-chee-PAH-leh eh een VEE-ah koor-tah-TOH-neh.
responses.french: Distribuita nel centro, il palazzo principale è in Via Curtatone.
